name: Motorcycle Holdings Limited
analysis: MTO has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 31% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.5100. Trade idea: entry A$2.6500, stop A$2.1978, target A$3.0880 (0.97:1) — then trail it.
